info.title: Find list page UI patterns (@explore subagent)

parts.text:
Look at /home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats and find how existing list pages render. Check these files for patterns:
1. src/routes/(protected)/(app)/contracts/index.tsx - how does a list page render items? What components does it use?
2. src/routes/(protected)/(app)/clients/ - check the index.tsx if it exists for client list page
3. Look at any Badge component in src/components/ui/ for entity type badges

Return the full source of the contracts/index.tsx and any client list page.
The user wants me to find and read specific files in the project. Let me start by checking for the existence of these files and then read them.
All three files exist. Let me read them all in parallel.
All three files exist. Let me read them all now.

7: const badgeVariants = cva(

16:         destructive:

18:         ghost:
19:           "hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground dark:hover:bg-muted/50",
20:         link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
21:         outline:

23:         secondary:

25:       },
26:     },

28: );
29: 
30: function Badge({
31:   className,
32:   variant = "default",
33:   render,
34:   ...props
35: }: useRender.ComponentProps<"span"> & VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants>) {
36:   return useRender({
37:     defaultTagName: "span",
38:     props: mergeProps<"span">(
39:       {
40:         className: cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className),
41:       },
42:       props,
43:     ),
44:     render,
45:     state: {
46:       slot: "badge",
47:       variant,
48:     },
49:   });
50: }
51: 
52: export { Badge, badgeVariants };
